features.name: Project Setup & Harness Integration
features.description: Establish Harness Engineering files (CLAUDE.md, init.sh, feature_list.json) to guide agent behavior
features.evidence: Bootstrapped using harness-creator, configured init.sh with bun format/typecheck/build, and verified by running validate-harness script.

features.name: Recursive Memory Summarization
features.description: Reduce sliding chat history window from 40 to 10 turns and integrate summaryContext into Groq prompts
features.evidence: Tested with chat API endpoints, verified context reduction and successful natural language Groq replies.

features.name: LLM Wiki Compiler & Metadata Timestamps
features.description: Implement strict upsert logic in rag.ts compileToLlmWiki and record updatedAt timestamps in vectorDocument metadata
features.evidence: Database query verified presence of updatedAt timestamp in vectorDocument metadata after wiki compilation.

features.name: Agent Self-Verification Integration
features.description: Ensure agent runs automated checks (init.sh) before completing tasks to prevent breaking changes
features.evidence: Fixed validate-harness execution path and command in sync-ai.ts. Verified bun run sync-ai completes both ./init.sh and validate-harness.ts checks.

features.name: Typst Integration for Agent Pro Max
features.description: Implement native compile support for Typst syntax blocks in Agent Pro Max chatbot using typst binary and render compiled SVGs directly
features.evidence: Installed typst binary CLI, implemented /api/agent/compile-typst endpoint, updated client-side renderTypstDiagrams, verified bundle compilation.

features.name: Advanced RAG Engine
features.description: Implement 5 advanced RAG techniques: Query Decomposition, HyDE, Step-Back Prompting, Contextual Retrieval, Advanced Cross-Encoder Reranking
features.evidence: 390-line advanced-rag.ts with all 5 techniques. Integrated into cognitive-core.ts (auto-detect complex queries >8 words) and swarm-dispatcher.ts (context injection).

features.name: Guardrails System
features.description: Safety system detecting jailbreak, harmful content, sensitive topics, and PII with block/warn/censor mechanisms
features.evidence: 234-line guardrails.ts with 8+ jailbreak patterns, harmful content detection, PII masking. Pattern-matching based (<1ms latency). Integrated into input and output pipeline.

features.name: RottraAI Translation Engine
features.description: 6-language translation system (vi, en, zh, ja, fi, he) with Google Translate free endpoint + JSON pre-cache + IndexedDB dynamic cache
features.evidence: ai-translator.ts with hub-and-spoke routing through English. JSON pre-cache in public/translations/. IndexedDB (rottra-translations DB) for dynamic content. POST /translate endpoint.

features.name: Multilingual Keyword Classifier
features.description: Keyword aliases in 6 languages for 9 intents, enabling intent matching from non-VI queries without translate-to-VI
features.evidence: multilingual-keywords.ts with 6 languages × 9 intents. Agent-router integrates as fallback when Vietnamese keyword score < 0.15.

features.name: Dynamic Temperature & Conversation Memory Upgrade
features.description: Auto-adjust temperature based on entropy. Importance scoring, topic tracking, cross-session memory merging for conversation memory.
features.evidence: Dynamic temperature in swarm-dispatcher.ts (3 lines). conversation-memory.ts: importance scoring, topic keywords, mergeImportanceAcrossSessions().

features.name: Markov Engine (MDP + HMM + MCMC)
features.description: Full Markov engine suite: MDP (Value/Policy Iteration), HMM (Forward-Backward, Viterbi, Baum-Welch), MCMC (Metropolis-Hastings, Gibbs, Rejection). Pre-built agricultural use cases.
features.evidence: markov-engine.ts with all algorithms and 3 pre-built models (Supply Chain MDP, Demand HMM, Price Sampler). Integrated into agent-router.ts.

features.name: Database Index Optimization
features.description: Add 12 indexes on frequently queried columns across SensorData, Order, Review, OrderItem, CropSeason tables
features.evidence: 12 indexes added to schema.ts covering farm_id, recorded_at, user_id, status, product_id, order_id columns.

features.name: Smart Chunking Strategies
features.description: 5 chunking strategies (fixed, sliding, semantic, paragraph, agricultural) with domain-aware boundary detection and hierarchical parent-child chunking
features.evidence: chunking-strategies.ts (NEW) with chunkDocument() and compileLongDocumentToWiki(). Integrated into vector-rag.ts.

features.name: AI Code Quality Audit & Fixes
features.description: Audit 47 AI files for 40 issues (7 critical, 12 medium, 21 low). Fix all critical and medium: race conditions, async/sync mismatches, timer leaks, dead code, dynamic imports.
features.evidence: 18 direct fixes across 17 files. Key patterns: dynamic imports for heavy deps, async file I/O, timer cleanup, concurrent buffer safety.

features.name: LCP Performance Optimization
features.description: Fix Largest Contentful Paint from 17.26s: skeleton preservation, eager Home import, non-blocking data fetch (createResource→createSignal+onMount), fire-and-forget initTranslationCache, non-blocking Google Fonts.
features.evidence: Build passes (16.28s). Changes in index.tsrx, root.tsrx, home.tsrx, index.html, market-seo.tsrx, manage-bilingual.tsrx. Harness score 100/100.
